title: Operation Shadow Hand
content:

Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] *[[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] *[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tekba]]† *[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[Kam Solusar]] *[[Kyle Katarn]] *[[Empatojayos Brand]]† *[[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Okko]] |commanders3= |commanders4= }} {{Quote|Someone…or something…has been biding its time, while the feuding Imperial factions distracted our attention…|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]|''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]''}} '''Operation Shadow Hand''' or the '''"Shadow Hand Strategy"''' was the name for the section of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] following in the wake of the [[Thrawn campaign]]. It was applied to the "wave assaults" from [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] and the rest of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] by the [[Dark Empire]] led by the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]], also known as [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Sidious, launched in an attempt to retake control of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] once more. ==Prelude== {{Main|Pre–Shadow Hand campaign}} [[File:Palps_Reborn-TEA.jpg|thumb|left|The resurrected Emperor, Darth Sidious]] Initially, the Galactic Empire retreated from the territory gained during the Thrawn Campaign, the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleets]] moving to the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] at Emperor Palpatine's secret command. The [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] followed the crumbling frontline deep into the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], sending more ships rimward to engage the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] and the "[[Restored Empire]]" in [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]], leaving [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] relatively undefended. The Imperial fleet struck out of the Deep Core, surprising the New Republic. They besieged [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]] and the [[Kaikielius system/Legends|Kaikielius system]], and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] abandoned the capital. The Galactic Empire was restored, and the New Republic became referred to as the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] again overnight. The New Republic government regrouped on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] in the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]], and at [[Pinnacle Base]] on [[Da Soocha V]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. Not long after the Empire secured the Core, however, disorder and chaos ensued. Any appearance of Imperial unity vanished, and the Galactic Empire finally fell into a [[Imperial Civil War|catastrophic civil war]]. Using captured [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], the Alliance helped along the anarchy, as entire worlds were destroyed, and warfleets gathered around Imperial worlds such as [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] and [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]]. New [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress worlds]] came into being, and Coruscant was turned into a wasteland. The reborn Emperor watched from [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], claiming such actions thinned the ranks of the weak and the cowards. In a perverse mirror of the numerous [[Sith Civil War]]s, Palpatine watched his war machine tear itself apart, destroying entire worlds and massacring civilians. He may even have encouraged the Imperial Mutiny with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], as it played into Palpatine's plans to establish a "[[Dark Empire]]," a galaxy-spanning [[Wikipedia:Magocracy|magocratic]] government ruled directly by the dark side of the Force rather than military might. ==The campaign== ===The turning of Luke Skywalker=== {{Quote|You. Are. Nothing.''"
"''Where am I?''"
"''Alone.''"
"''No - Help me-''"
"''There is no one. There is only the Dark Side.''"
"''I... am... a Jedi. Aaaaah!''"
"''You are not Jedi. You are nothing. You have no name.''"
"''My name - is - Skywalker! AAAAAAH!''"
"''YOU. HAVE. NO. NAME!''"
"''I-''"
"''Listen to the Dark Side. You have no name.''"
"''I have... *dully*no name.''"
"''You serve the Dark Side.''"
"''I... s-serve...|Palpatine corrupts Luke to his service|''[[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition]]'' radio drama.}} The New Republic involved itself in the Imperial Civil War by stirring up regional hatred with attacks using captured Imperial starships on rival feuding Imperial factions. It was on one of these missions that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was swept up in a powerful [[Force storm (wormhole)|Force storm]], which brought him to the Deep Core world of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]. There, Skywalker met the resurrected Emperor Palpatine. Faced with a revived Darth Sidious, Skywalker decided to do what many had tried in the past—to destroy the dark side from within. He agreed to become the [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Imperial Fleet]], and lead the new attack on the Republic. ===The assault on Mon Calamari=== {{Quote|Whoever is reunifying the Empire is carrying out the Emperor's decision to discipline us… with these new World Devastators!|Admiral Ackbar|}} {{Main|Battle of Calamari}} [[File:WorldDev.jpg|thumb|right|200px|World Devastators demolish Mon Calamari cities.]] Sidious retook control of the Empire shortly after capturing [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], sending the Imperial Navy and fleets of [[World Devastator]]s to attack the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]], pushing on to [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], and intending to split Rebel territory in half. The World Devastators under the command of General [[Titus Klev]] aboard the ''[[Silencer-7]]'' proved almost impossible to destroy, and an attempt by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Salla Zend]], and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] to [[Duel on Byss|rescue Luke on Byss]] met with failure. However, Luke had successfully smuggled the command codes of the World Devastators to Leia, and the New Republic was able to shut them down remotely. The [[Battle of Calamari]] cost the Empire its newest [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], but Palpatine managed to truly turn Luke to the dark side as they duelled on Byss. ===The Battle of Pinnacle Base=== {{Quote|My ally is the Force. Through the strength of the Force, your shroud of evil has been lifted from my mind.''"
"''So be it… THROUGH THE POWER OF THE FORCE YOU WILL DIE!|Luke Skywalker and Palpatine|}} {{Main|Battle of Pinnacle Base}} With Luke now truly his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], Palpatine personally took him aboard his [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|new dreadnought]] [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']] to Da Soocha V, demanding the surrender of Leia Organa Solo in return for truce negotiations. However, after Leia came aboard the ''Eclipse'', she was able to turn her brother back to the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side of the Force]]. Enraged, the Emperor summoned a [[Force Storm]] to [[Battle of Pinnacle Base|destroy Da Soocha]] and the New Republic base. However, overcome by Skywalker and Organa Solo, he lost control of his Storm and it consumed the ''Eclipse'' and himself. Returned to the New Republic, Skywalker began building his own [[New Jedi Order]] to defeat the Emperor and his [[Dark Side Elite]]. ===Sedriss' campaigns=== {{Main|Battle of Balmorra|Second Duel on Byss|Skirmish on Ossus}} {{Quote|I...I don't know. Something...a great disturbance in the Force...terrible...and all too familiar....!''"
"''What do you mean?''"
"''Sedriss wasn't lying. Emperor Palpatine is ALIVE!! Somehow, he's alive again!|Luke Skywalker and Kam Solusar|[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]]}} Despite these setbacks, the Shadow Hand campaign was taken over by [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]], who struck at recalcitrant worlds in the Core and the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] lying adjacent to the territory conquered in [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign|the initial campaign]]. He also attacked numerous worlds in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] and the industrial worlds of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], and [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]]. However, at the [[Battle of Balmorra]], Sedriss' [[SD-9 battle droid]]s and [[Shadow Droid]]s were seen off by Governor [[Hinch Beltane]]'s new [[SD-10 battle droid|SD-10]] and [[X-1 Viper]] "Automadon" droids. [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Captain Maximillian Veers]] was killed in action, and the campaign stalled long enough to force Sedriss to open truce negotiations: Sedriss accepted a shipment of Viper battle droids from the Balmorran factories in return for accepting Balmorran independence. With Palpatine still convalescing after the defeat at Da Soocha and Sedriss discredited at Balmorra, two [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adepts]], [[Nefta]] and [[Sa-Di]], attempted a coup on Byss. Returned from Balmorra, Sedriss [[Skirmish on Byss|duelled and defeated]] the pair and then submitted himself to Emperor Palpatine, now returned in a second clone body. Shortly thereafter, Sedriss traveled to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] aboard an [[Imperial hunter (starship)|Imperial Hunter]] to capture Luke Skywalker, who was investigating the ancient library world of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as part of his efforts to rebuild his own. In the [[Skirmish on Ossus|ensuing battle]], Sedriss' force was wiped out and the Executor was killed by the [[Neti/Legends|Neti]] [[Ood Bnar]], who had survived there in a tree-like form since the planet was [[Battle of Ossus (Great Sith War)|devastated]] by [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]]. ===The Galaxy Gun=== {{Main|Galaxy Gun}} [[File:NespisVIIIcitydestroyed.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Space City at Nespis VIII is destroyed.]] The New Republic pinned its hopes on killing Darth Sidious, just as they had done at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. With the support of Balmorra's Governor Beltane, a New Republic commando force led by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] intercepted the shipment of [[X-1 Viper|Viper droids]] arranged by Sedriss and took control of the droids from their internal command cabins. On Byss, they burst from their freighter and [[Battle of the Emperor's Citadel|assaulted the Emperor's Citadel]]. However, the Viper droids proved to be useless against Palpatine's [[Sith alchemy/Legends|alchemically-enhanced]] [[Chrysalide]] [[Rancor/Legends|Rancors]], which forced the expedition to retreat in defeat after being rescued by a group of smugglers led by [[Salla Zend]]. In the aftermath of the raid, Palpatine unleashed the [[Galaxy Gun]], a massive interstellar-range artillery gun which fired planet-destroying missiles. [[Da Soocha V]] was [[Destruction of Da Soocha V|obliterated]] in the Gun's first firing, though the New Republic leadership had since evacuated to the [[Nespis VIII]] [[Nespis VIII|Space City]]. A plan to attack Byss for a second time to destroy the Galaxy Gun was foiled when it [[Destruction of the Pelagia|destroyed]] the troopship ''[[Pelagia]]'', killing a hundred thousand troops. The Galaxy Gun subsequently destroyed the Space City, scattering the New Republic. The Galaxy Gun turned the tide against the New Republic, as the Emperor used it to destroy worlds like [[Krinemonen]] and [[Hirsi]], and thousands of worlds re-submitted to Imperial rule. ===Endgame=== {{Main|Battle of Onderon (Galactic Civil War)|Destruction of Byss}} [[File:Last_Clone_Body.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Emperor Palpatine attempts to transfer his soul to Anakin Solo.]] With the destruction of the rebel bases on Da Soocha and at [[Nespis VIII|Space City]] by the Galaxy Gun, the New Republic scattered, vanishing into the galaxy. The Empire, for all intents and purposes, had won, driving the Alliance into complete hiding. However, in opposition to this military victory was the Emperor's waning health: Palpatine's power in the dark side was slowly causing his mind to degenerate. Faced by the increasing insanity of their Emperor, a cabal within the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] composed of the [[Emperor's physician]] and the traitorous [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guard]] [[Carnor Jax]], who wished to become Emperor in Palpatine's stead, poisoned the genetic material used to make Palpatine's clone bodies. Palpatine traveled to [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] to consult the spirits of the Sith Lords there, who advised him to enter the body of Leia Organa Solo's newest son, [[Anakin Solo|Anakin]]. Taking the [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|''Eclipse''-class dreadnought]] ''[[Eclipse II]]'' to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], the Emperor engaged the Alliance and Jedi. Catastrophe followed, with the Emperor being finally defeated and the ''Eclipse II'' launched towards Byss due to sabotage by the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], where it rammed the Galaxy Gun and caused it to fire a missile into Byss. This [[Destruction of Byss|destroyed]] the throneworld and the Imperial fleet around it, which combined with the death of Darth Sidious, effectively cutting the heart from the Empire both politically and militarily. ==Aftermath== The campaign started with the Empire holding half the galaxy at the end of [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], and saw the Empire lose most of this newly captured territory in the weeks following [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] death, only to consolidate half of the galaxy again under the clone Emperor. Subsequent to expanding further, the Emperor was finally killed and the Empire abandoned Coruscant and the Core Worlds, splitting again yet still consolidating control of a third of the galaxy in the Outer Rim - more than what the Empire initially held before Grand Admiral Thrawn returned. The majority of the Imperial fleet retreated into the Deep Core in the aftermath, [[Blitzer Harrsk]] and [[Treuten Teradoc]] becoming the primary warlords, the [[Pentastar Alignment]] remaining a major Imperial power in the Outer Rim, and fortress worlds with little fleet strength holding out throughout Imperial territory. The Empire proper was held by the Imperial Ruling Council under Emperor Carnor Jax and his [[Crimson Empire]], but that didn't last long after [[Byss/Legends|Byss's]] destruction. The Empire's fleets thereafter, however, were severely reduced, with the most powerful Deep Core warlord, Admiral [[Treuten Teradoc|Teradoc]], only fielding seventy [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]]. The unification of the Deep Core under Admiral [[Natasi Daala]], which held the majority of the Imperial Fleet, saw less than two hundred [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] gather under her banner. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was similarly decimated in the fighting, barely claiming membership of 11,000 worlds by [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], and fielding only four fleets as opposed to both sides fielding hundreds of [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleets]]. During the Shadow Hand Campaign, the Republic retreated into the Outer Rim, placing its main bases inside [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]], and the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], rather than in territory accessible to or largely a part of the mainstream galaxy. The Republic never saw massive membership until it finally defeated the Empire at the [[Battle of Anx Minor]], forcing it back to only eight sectors. The New Republic Navy's poor performance against Imperial [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnoughts]] during the campaign inspired the development of their own dreadnought analogues, the [[Mediator-class battle cruiser|''Mediator''-class battle cruiser]] and the [[Viscount-class Star Defender|''Viscount''-class Star Defender]] as part of the [[New Class Modernization Program]] in the aftermath of Operation Shadow Hand.''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' Perhaps most notably, Operation Shadow Hand was the last major action of a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-led Galactic Empire for over a [[Standard century/Legends|hundred years]], and the following [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] would see the Empire move further and further away from the Sith and their ideals, until political relations were non-existent. A portion of the Empire remained under the control of the Sith apprentice Carnor Jax, but his death saw only isolated factions of Sith or [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]-led Imperials emerge, such as the [[Empire Reborn]] and the [[Disciples of Ragnos]]. Eventually the relationship soured, and during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the reigning Dark Lady [[Lumiya]] attacked the [[Imperial Remnant]] in the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Yaga Minor]]. Eventually, the [[Fel Empire|reborn Galactic Empire]], following the [[Fel dynasty]], would reluctantly ally with the [[One Sith]] during the [[Sith–Imperial War|Sith-Imperial War]], but was splintered into a [[Second Imperial Civil War]] by a [[Attack on Emperor Fel|Sith coup]] in [[130 ABY]]. Following the destruction of [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|faction]], the Empire would be at war with the Sith until their [[Battle of the Floating World|destruction]] in [[139 ABY]]. As a result, the Galactic Empire which was [[Declaration of a New Order|originally created]] by Palpatine to [[Grand Plan/Legends|benefit]] the Sith ultimately turned against and destroyed them.
